Metadata.title: ServiExpress JC — Cross-Border Freight Between Mexico & the U.S.
Metadata.description: Trucking company specializing in domestic and cross-border freight between Mexico and the United States. 10+ years on the road, 24/7 GPS tracking, company-owned fleet.

Hero.subtitle: Specialized freight transport between Mexico and the United States. Every truck tracked by GPS around the clock — from our control room to your end customer.

Clients.title: Companies that trust us
Clients.subtitle: We work with leading companies across Mexico and the United States
Clients.more: And many more companies that rely on our freight services

Features.title: Reasons to trust us with your freight
Features.subtitle: Concrete advantages, backed by evidence — not adjectives.

items.title: 24/7 security
items.description: Real-time GPS tracking for safe, on-time deliveries.

items.title: Broad coverage
items.description: Domestic and cross-border Mexico–U.S. service across multiple lanes.

items.title: On-time delivery
items.description: Committed to delivery windows, with personalized attention.

items.title: 5 in-house repair shops
items.description: In-house maintenance plus our Los César parts store with deep inventory.

items.title: Certified drivers
items.description: Highly trained drivers holding B1 certification for the border crossing.

Services.title: What we haul, proven on the road
Services.subtitle: Domestic and cross-border freight, with our own trucks and certified drivers end to end.

national.imageAlt: ServiExpress JC truck hauling steel freight
national.title: Domestic freight
national.description: Local, regional, and long-haul service across Mexico. Steel, agricultural, dry, and oversized freight — GPS-tracked from origin to destination.

international.imageAlt: ServiExpress JC tractor at a certified scale in the United States
international.title: Cross-border freight
international.description: Door-to-door cross-border service. Crossing at Laredo, TX with B1-certified drivers and dual-plated trucks.

specialized.imageAlt: ServiExpress JC truck loaded with agricultural hay bales
specialized.title: One fleet, many kinds of freight
specialized.description: From rebar and steel profiles to hay bales: flatbeds, 53-foot dry vans, and equipment for oversized loads — always secured and tracked.

Certifications.title: Certifications & Guarantees
Certifications.subtitle: We meet every quality and safety standard in the industry

items.title: B1 Certification
items.description: Drivers certified with a federal B1 license for freight transport

items.title: Dual Plates
items.description: Trucks with dual Mexico–U.S. plates for a hassle-free border crossing

items.title: Full Cargo Insurance
items.description: Comprehensive cargo insurance coverage to protect your goods

items.title: Certified Fleet
items.description: Trucks with current inspections and ongoing preventive maintenance

Talleres.description: We don't outsource anything — not even maintenance. Five shops staffed by fully trained technicians service our fleet, so your freight travels on reliable equipment and your deliveries never depend on a third party.
Talleres.imageAlt: Classic ServiExpress JC Kenworth, restored and maintained in our own shops
Talleres.overlay: Every truck gets this level of care

pillars.title: No third-party dependence
pillars.caption: A breakdown never stops your delivery

About.title: Real people behind every delivery
About.subtitle: ServiExpress JC is a trucking company with more than a decade of experience in domestic and cross-border freight. A company-owned fleet, driven and maintained by our own people.
About.fleetAlt: ServiExpress JC tractor fleet at our terminal
About.missionText: To deliver a quality service that meets our customers' needs, coordinating and monitoring every shipment with the best people.
About.visionText: To be recognized as one of the most competitive trucking companies in Mexico and the U.S., growing our value year after year.

Coverage.title: Domestic and cross-border coverage
Coverage.subtitle: A corridor monitored point to point, from the Bajío to the southeastern United States.
Coverage.mapAria: Map of the Mexico–United States freight corridor

Testimonials.title: What our customers say
Testimonials.subtitle: Steel producers and exporters who move their freight with us.

items.quote: We trust SERVIEXPRESS JC with our northern routes, and now with our exports as well. Always on time, with excellent tracking.
Their GPS monitoring gives us total peace of mind. We know exactly where our freight is at all times.
Professionalism and personalized attention. They have been key to the growth of our business.

quote.title: Request your quote
quote.description: Tell us your lane and your freight — we'll come back with a tailored proposal.
quote.name: Full name
quote.detailsPh: Type, weight, and dimensions of the load

apply.title: Join our team
apply.description: We're hiring certified drivers and committed team members.
apply.name: Full name

whatsapp.title: Need help right away?
whatsapp.description: Message us on WhatsApp and we'll get back to you in minutes.

Footer.tagline: Efficiency on wheels, commitment beyond borders
